title: Linda Lawrence
compiled_truth: Linda Lawrence is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-17 to 2001-07-20), Linda Lawrence sent 15 and received 111 emails, totalling 126 interactions. Top correspondents: [Christi Nicolay](people/christi-nicolay) (9), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (9), [Mary Hain](people/mary-hain) (7), [Elizabeth Linnell](people/elizabeth-linnell) (5), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (4).
